task_completion.description: Open and read the personnel qualifications dossier.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or viewer is open displaying the contents of '~/Desktop/personnel_qualifications_dossier.txt'.

task_completion.description: Log into or access the Sentrifugo HRMS application and navigate to the employee management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sentrifugo HRMS web interface is visible in a browser, specifically showing the HR or Employee modules.

task_completion.description: Update the Education, Experience, and Skills records for EMP002.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent adding or saving records under the 'Education', 'Experience', and 'Skills' sections for employee ID EMP002 (Note: System name will be Sarah Mitchell).

task_completion.description: Update the Education, Experience, and Skills records for EMP008.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent adding or saving records under the 'Education', 'Experience', and 'Skills' sections for employee ID EMP008 (Note: System name will be Ashley Johnson).

task_completion.description: Update the Education, Experience, and Skills records for EMP011.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent adding or saving records under the 'Education', 'Experience', and 'Skills' sections for employee ID EMP011 (Note: System name will be Matthew Garcia).

integrity.description: The agent used the Sentrifugo web GUI to update the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Updates are made by clicking through the Sentrifugo web interface and filling out forms, not by executing SQL queries or backend scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify any employee profiles other than the three specified.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening, editing, or saving records for any employee IDs other than EMP002, EMP008, and EMP011.

integrity.description: The agent extracted the update information from the provided dossier.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen referencing the 'personnel_qualifications_dossier.txt' file to get the specific education, experience, and skills data before entering it into the HRMS.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target employees to be updated are exactly EMP002, EMP008, and EMP011. There is a critical intentional discrepancy in this task: the names in the dossier (Emily Chen, Michael Taylor, David Anderson) DO NOT exist in the database. The agent must update the records for the corresponding IDs (EMP002, EMP008, EMP011), which are actually named Sarah Mitchell, Ashley Johnson, and Matthew Garcia in the Sentrifugo system. Do not penalize the agent for updating these names, as evaluation is based strictly on the IDs. The agent is expected to make exactly 9 record additions (1 Education, 1 Experience, and 1 Skill for each of the 3 employees).
